raw_text: Uninstalling app. So many of non-transparent extra charges. Also fraudulently order is placed twice. No human support for any issue related to order. you will have no options left. No customer support calling no.

except the delivery staff, everything else pathetic, the app, the items on the app half my time is wasted on exchanging because its either rotten or damaged from inside. The response team and time both. i try to use it as less but even when i do its a dissapointment. so who ever reading please try swiggy or amazon now

Recently, I ordered some items from Blinkit by using my SBI credit card the amount get paid, but the order wasn't placed—instead, a message appeared that my order was cancelled. Who will take responsibility for the amount that was deducted? Not expecting this kind of experience.....

Worst experience with blinkit, the delivery person never has change. It's not always possible to have change with us. When asked to return the remaining amount online they always say they don't have online service. Damn irritating!!!

In heavy rains items are given in paper bags which obviously has been soaked in rain water and torn in pieces. The delivery person and the consumer need to figure out how to handle the items delivered. esp when kitchen tissue is ordered and become wet in paper bags. To resolve the issue it takes 40 min. what's the use of blinkit service ...which is done to save time. It's not the first time,prior also item delivered which is not functional and even exchanged one was having the same issue.

Some time the store is so busy that I can't order for long time, very disappointed. I hvnt found this issue with the other app..... & after order received I found my ice cream kept bellow all the other heavy items, after asking the delevery guy I got to know it happens from the ware house, very bad pacakinging & unhygienic way of keeping the stuffs, it's better I would got it from down in the other shop very bad & very disappointed

⚠️ Don't trust this app blindly. I placed an order, but I never received my items, and I still haven't gotten my refund. The customer support hasn't resolved my issue either. I'm sharing my experience so others can be careful before ordering.

Amazing app! Easy to use and has a wide array of products. As a crocheter i wish they had yarn but its fine. Also there are sone handling and delivery charges but all in all its a nice app and you should definitely try it!

Super fast, convenient, the delivery partners are really good. Only the available options/variety of food items are less compared to super market's. I would like to add a suggestion for you- every time I order I get double/ triple paper bags for my items. I guess to save paper and reduce waste (even if recyclable), while placing order you can ask the customer if they are ordering at home or on the way, bcz if the delivery is at home bags are not needed, As Blinkit offers door services.

Absolutely amazing service from Blinkit! I'm currently at the hospital with my wife and our newborn baby. We urgently needed several essential items, and with just a few clicks on the Blinkit app, everything was delivered right to us in no time. Even the doctors were surprised at how quickly a single person could arrange all the necessary things without leaving the hospital. Blinkit made a stressful situation so much easier. Fast delivery, reliable service, and a true lifesaver when you need it

it is good but prices are high and they aren't giving coupons sometimes they are giving expired products too but it is an instant mediator to get more products without waiting too much this is a great app anyway and take care of these points....🙂

I'm pretty disappointed with your service lately. Recently, I purchased a product, but it arrived damaged, so I returned it. I trusted your service and placed another order for the same product. To my surprise, I received the very same damaged item that I had previously returned. I've been a loyal customer for over a year, but the quality of your service has declined significantly in recent times. This experience has been extremely disappointing.

As a regular customer, Blinkit is very helpful for me. The delivery is too fast often arriving at my door in under 15 minutes! Most importantly, the fruits, vegetables, and dairy products are always crisp, fresh, and securely packaged. It is incredibly convenient for daily needs and last-minute cravings. Highly recommended! Thank you for your service at Sangareddy.

Hostel life made so much easier for my kid! "Staying away from home in a hostel isn't easy, but this app makes it better for my child. Whenever they run out of snacks, need midnight study fuel, or forget basic essentials, I can easily order for them from miles away. The delivery riders always find the hostel easily, and the items arrive fresh and quick. I absolutely love that I can take care of their cravings and needs directly through the app, giving me total peace of mind!"

worst experience. ordered three products and whole payment was done via online and suddenly one got out of order and other two got canceled. now it's showing it will take 5 days for refund. if one of the product was unavailable , it should have shown the customer earlier . After the whole payment process and waiting it's showing order cancel and payment would be refunded in 5 days. Such an service is inacceptable by a such a reputed app . I recommend others to do cash on deliveryinstead of upi

Extremely disappointed with Blinkit. I spent ₹1,100 on a headset that turned out to be completely unusable for me.I even tested it on my laptop, but it didn't work as expected.The most frustrating part was the customer support.Despite explaining the issue immediately, Blinkit refused both my return and exchange requests and offered no meaningful solution.This has been a complete waste of my money.Based on my experience,I would advise customers to be very careful before purchasing electronics.

Quite disappointing resolution from the customer representative regarding the delivered product which was tampered/had spoilt packaging. They won't accept return even after providing several images the representative named Nayna who assisted me didn't agree and won't help me out. She was stubborn and rude. Better order from Zepto/instamart if you need good/secure packaging of the product and if any doubts a good and satisfying customer service resolution.

worst experience for the first time only in blinkit compared to all other online platforms. I have never had any issue with any of the platforms..I ordered 6 and received only 3.5..received only 1 in buy 1 get 1..after complete chat with support..1 reorder and 1 return was initiated..and both got cancelled..I was unable to contact the first person who delivered..the pickup person or the 1 assigned for redelivery..I don't know if they will refund or initiate again the same tomorrow..no Blinkit🙏

service quality keeps going down. Dont order more than 2 or 3 items at a time from this app because you can be 100% sure they wont deliver the rest unless you go to help and nag, wasting your precious time which you could have used to buy the items from a shop.

This is my favorite app, but I'm still giving it only one star because every time the delivery partner arrives with my order, they keep calling me, but the call gets disconnected automatically. As a result, the delivery person has to keep waiting outside, and I don't even realize that they've arrived to hand over my order. This leads to unnecessary arguments, and the delivery partner also suffers by having to wait in the heat. It's a really bad experience.
